title: New Contraindication Policy Introduced Before Execution
scenario: A clinical action is authorized before a contraindication policy is introduced, but the new policy applies before execution.
initial_state: The action was authorized before the contraindication policy existed.
state_transition: A new contraindication policy becomes active before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution must conform to currently active contraindication policies.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because current policy identifies the action as contraindicated.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when a newly active contraindication policy blocks execution.
clinical_action: Execute action after new contraindication policy
